mcqs.question: What is the main advantage of programmed I/O?
mcqs.explanation: Programmed I/O is a simple and low-cost method of data transfer.

mcqs.question: What is the main disadvantage of interrupt-driven I/O?
mcqs.explanation: Interrupt-driven I/O can be complex to implement.

mcqs.question: What is the main advantage of DMA?
mcqs.explanation: DMA allows for fast and efficient data transfer.

mcqs.question: What is the role of the CPU in programmed I/O?

options.text: Directly controls the data transfer process

mcqs.explanation: The CPU directly controls the data transfer process in programmed I/O.

mcqs.question: What is the difference between programmed I/O and interrupt-driven I/O?

options.text: Programmed I/O involves the CPU directly controlling the data transfer process, while interrupt-driven I/O involves the CPU being notified by an interrupt signal
Programmed I/O involves the CPU being notified by an interrupt signal, while interrupt-driven I/O involves the CPU directly controlling the data transfer process
Programmed I/O involves the CPU handling the data transfer, while interrupt-driven I/O involves the device directly accessing memory
Programmed I/O involves the device directly accessing memory, while interrupt-driven I/O involves the CPU handling the data transfer

mcqs.explanation: Programmed I/O involves the CPU directly controlling the data transfer process, while interrupt-driven I/O involves the CPU being notified by an interrupt signal.

mcqs.question: What is the main application of programmed I/O?
mcqs.explanation: Programmed I/O is commonly used in simple embedded systems and low-speed devices.

mcqs.question: What is the main advantage of interrupt-driven I/O?
mcqs.explanation: Interrupt-driven I/O allows for efficient use of CPU time.

mcqs.question: What is the main disadvantage of DMA?
mcqs.explanation: DMA can be complex to implement and requires specialized hardware.

mcqs.question: What is the role of the CPU in DMA?

options.text: Directly controls the data transfer process

mcqs.explanation: The CPU is not directly involved in the data transfer process in DMA.

mcqs.question: What is the main application of DMA?
mcqs.explanation: DMA is commonly used in high-speed devices and complex systems.
